channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: Fed meeting live updates: Kevin Warsh holds first press conference as chairman
item.description: The Federal Reserve’s rate decision on Wednesday marks the first one with Kevin Warsh at the helm.

item.title: Chairman Warsh drastically alters Fed rate statement. Here's what's changed
item.description: This is a comparison of Wednesday's Federal Open Market Committee statement with the one issued after the Fed's previous policymaking meeting in April.

item.title: Chairman Warsh abstains from giving rate forecast as several members signal a hike in 2026
item.description: The median projection called for the federal funds rate to end 2026 at 3.8%, a quarter percentage point above the current target range.

item.title: Trump says he likes idea of blaming Vance if Iran deal doesn't work out
item.description: President Trump at the G7 summit said the memorandum of understanding reached with Iran "might not be the kind of document that I should be signing."

item.title: 2-year Treasury yield rockets higher as many Fed officials signal possible hike this year
item.description: U.S. Treasury yields rose on Wednesday after the Fed held interest rates steady during Kevin Warsh's first policy meeting as chairman.

item.title: JPMorgan says clients should be 'aggressive buyers' of this chip stock
item.description: Broadcom is trading at a relative discount, according to JPMorgan.

item.title: Fed holds interest rates steady: Here's what that means for credit cards, savings rates, mortgages and car loans
item.description: Here’s a look at how the Fed's June interest rate decision may affect your finances.

item.title: JetBlue to reduce Newark, LaGuardia footprint as it forges ahead in Fort Lauderdale
item.description: JetBlue is planning to cut some employee bases at Newark Liberty International Airport in New Jersey and tech bases at New York's LaGuardia Airport.

item.title: Trump sabotages Senate bid to fast-track Clayton as DNI, committee scuttles hearing
item.description: Any delay, and continuation of acting DNI Bill Pulte in the role, is likely to endanger the reauthorization of a key U.S. intelligence authority.

item.title: CEOs of Anthropic and Google DeepMind call for U.S.-led AI coalition in meeting at G7
item.description: Tech leaders and heads of state, including President Donald Trump, joined a meeting about AI standards at the G7 Summit.

item.title: 'Passive' investors who dodged bitcoin are now forced to own SpaceX, which is three times more volatile
item.description: Many advisors and money-managers invested in index funds who will soon be owners of Elon Musk's astronomic ambitions

item.title: The private space race is spurring a luxury hotel land grab for Florida oceanfront property
item.description: The rise of the private space industry, with companies like SpaceX and Blue Origin, has spurred demand for commercial real estate on Florida's space coast.

item.title: Allbirds continues AI pivot with name change and CEO hire, sending stock soaring
item.description: Allbirds became NewBird AI in April and said it would trade shoes for AI compute infrastructure.

item.title: SpaceX stock sinks 5%, losing momentum after a multiday rally
item.description: Elon Musk's space and AI company has seen its stock surge since its blockbuster IPO on Friday.

item.title: Wells Fargo says investors need to prioritize income. Where it sees opportunity
item.description: Here's how Wells Fargo would build a "resilient, multi-asset class income stream."

item.title: CarMax shares fall after used car retailer reports earnings beats, CEO details turnaround plan
item.description: Despite the beats, questions remain about the company's ability to grow and cut costs under the plan amid tougher market conditions, including margin pressure.

item.title: Amazon AI exec predicts first 'commercially useful' quantum computers in 5-7 years
item.description: Quantum computing is becoming an increasingly competitive field, with tech giants including Microsoft, Google and IBM developing the technology.

item.title: Less than one-third of global workers feel their jobs are safe, ADP survey data shows
item.description: Even with global unemployment at historically low levels, workers are not feeling secure.

item.title: UniQure to seek FDA approval for Huntington's disease gene therapy after previous clash with agency
item.description: The announcement comes months after UniQure became embroiled in a public debate with FDA leaders over the clinical trial data supporting its application.

item.title: Carvana’s new vehicle strategy turns dealership into ‘playground,’ test-drive center with sales all online
item.description: But don't expect Carvana to sell you a vehicle at one of its seven Stellantis stores, marking a stark contrast from typical franchised dealers.

item.title: We're buying more of one industrial-focused stock and booking some profits in another
item.description: These moves are consistent with what we said during Wednesday afternoon's June Monthly Meeting.

item.title: Can you get a loan for a wedding? The do's, don'ts and alternatives
item.description: You can take out a personal loan to finance your wedding, but follow these guidelines first.

item.title: Target, Walmart and Amazon among brands losing LGBTQ+ consumer spending, new survey says
item.description: LGBTQ+ consumers are shifting spending toward companies they view as supporting DEI and away from those seen as retreating, HRC survey finds.

item.title: Strait of Hormuz threat level downgraded after Iran deal, says U.S.-led maritime security group
item.description: The behavior of Iranian forces "has become less volatile" and the U.S. Navy continues to provide oversight, the Joint Maritime Information Center said.

item.title: SpaceX surge is creating a unique hedging opportunity
item.description: Tuesday's launch of SpaceX options set new records for a first-day, post-IPO options volume.

item.title: The broadening stock market trade: What to buy outside AI
item.description: Artificial intelligence has been the driving force for the stock market since late 2022, with investors looking for exposure to the emerging technology.

item.title: CNBC to wade further into live sports with 11 simulcast WNBA games
item.description: The simulcasts will expose the WNBA to an affluent audience on CNBC and marks a new chapter for the business news network after it spun out from Comcast.

item.title: Making money in this market requires rigor and passion — just not in equal parts
item.description: I spend a huge amount of time trying to control the passion. But stock picking isn't always that rigorous.

item.title: From supply shock to oil glut: IEA flags scale of demand destruction caused by Iran war
item.description: The energy supply shock triggered by the Iran War has prompted the IEA to slash its global oil demand forecast.

item.title: CME Group's Terry Duffy to step down in 2027, CFO Lynne Fitzpatrick to become CEO
item.description: Duffy, 67, will transition to executive chairman effective March 1, 2027, the company said Wednesday.
